chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 38 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.2297/2025 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.408/2025 20.11.2025 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for the applicant Mr. Shamsuddin Bhayo, advocate for respondent No.1. It is jointly stated that the matter is squarely addressed by order dated 27.02.2025 passed in SCRA 60 of 2024, therefore, it may be in the interest of justice of all parties concerned for this reference application to also be disposed of on the same terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
